summary: Iteration 104 - Marketing Calendar Module Testing Complete. All 9 backend tests passed (3 skipped due to no January entries). Frontend verified: Calendar page loads with 3 tabs (Calendar, Pages, Pipeline), 2 test pages visible (CLT Academy Main, CLT on X) with correct platform icons and frequency badges, calendar grid shows color-coded entries, entry detail dialog opens with status pipeline buttons, status update works (Planned → Video Shot), AI suggestion button present.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 2 pages (CLT Academy Main, CLT on X) and 5 calendar entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 104 verified Marketing Calendar module: 1) Page CRUD: GET /api/marketing/calendar/pages returns 2 pages, POST creates new page with auto-assigned color, PUT updates, DELETE removes page and its entries. 2) Calendar Generation: POST /api/marketing/calendar/generate creates entries based on posting frequency (daily=every day, alternate_day=every 2 days). 3) Calendar Entries: GET /api/marketing/calendar/entries?month=YYYY-MM returns entries, PUT updates status/title/description/content_type. 4) Stats: GET /api/marketing/calendar/stats returns {month, total_entries, by_status: {planned, video_shot, edited, approved, posted}, page_stats}. 5) AI Suggestion: POST /api/marketing/calendar/entries/{id}/suggest - may fail due to LLM budget. 6) Deadline Check: POST /api/marketing/calendar/check-deadlines returns at_risk count. Frontend: /marketing/calendar page has 3 tabs (Calendar, Pages, Pipeline), entry detail dialog with clickable status pipeline buttons, AI suggestion button, content type selector. Sidebar shows Marketing section with Content Calendar link.

marketing_calendar_page_load.details: Page loads at /marketing/calendar with Marketing Calendar title and 3 tabs

pages_tab_existing_pages.details: Pages tab shows 2 pages: CLT Academy Main (Instagram, @clt_academy, Alternate Day) and CLT on X (X/Twitter, @CLT_Academy, Daily)

pages_tab_platform_icons.details: Platform icons visible (Instagram icon for CLT Academy Main, X icon for CLT on X)

add_page_dialog.details: Add Page button opens dialog with name, platform, handle, frequency, URL, description fields

calendar_grid.details: Calendar grid shows March 2026 with color-coded entries on dates 29, 30, 31

calendar_entry_click.details: Clicking calendar entry opens detail dialog

entry_detail_dialog.details: Dialog shows page name, date, status pipeline buttons, title input, description textarea, content type selector, AI suggestion button

status_pipeline_buttons.details: All 5 status buttons visible: Planned, Video Shot, Edited, Approved, Posted

status_update.details: Clicking Video Shot button updates status and shows 'Updated' toast

ai_suggestion_button.details: Get Suggestion button visible in entry dialog (may fail due to LLM budget)

pipeline_tab.details: Pipeline tab shows status breakdown with counts (5 Planned, 0 Video Shot, 0 Edited, 0 Approved, 0 Posted)

generate_calendar_button.details: Generate Calendar button visible and functional

sidebar_marketing_section.details: Sidebar shows Marketing section with Content Calendar link

notes.ai_suggestion: AI suggestion endpoint may fail due to LLM budget exceeded - this is expected behavior
notes.calendar_entries: 5 entries exist for March 2026 (dates 29, 30, 31) - all in 'planned' status initially
